text.message: All you had to do was point your road to the 9 ore
You knew you were going to get every roll to start the game
You had no sheep. No chance of beating me there
You are just too good man
So skillful to roll a 7 there
Shame I smashed you last game when you had every roll haha
Oh how dare you roll a 7
So why so mean last game for no reason?
Nice city. Oh wait you have none
But I got a lot better win rate than you
You don’t even play 4 player lol
